notes: Their main damage was Aurora (24k magical); 3/5 of you itemized magic resist.
Enemy ran 2/5 on or near their meta core.

draftNote: 1 of five queued off a bottom-two lane: Mr_Meat31 (support→offlane).

coaching.headline: Two clean Fangtooth/Primal aces behind a fed Sparrow won it, even with three lanes read as theirs.
coaching.team: Offlane, support and carry were all read as theirs, but you won on objective tempo and two decisive aces. The 14.4 Fangtooth fight (4-1) flipped the early game, and the 26.8 Primal Fangtooth ace (4-0) closed it — towers ended 10 to 5. Sparrow went 12/4 as the carry. Your one weakness was a pair of open-map bad trades: the 12.9 river loss (0-3) and the 23.7 trade (1-3) with no major up. Both were avoidable — when there's no objective on the line, don't flip a fight you don't have to. The good news is you answered the threat: Aurora (24k magical) was their carry and three of you built magic resist, which is exactly why the late fights went your way.
coaching.whatShiftedIt: Winning the 14.4 Fangtooth fight (4-1) and the 26.8 Primal Fangtooth ace (4-0) behind a fed Sparrow (12 kills) — and three of five building magic resist to answer Aurora.

perPlayer.7c8ab99c-31c5-4ea5-a6fa-e0d6417c3f1b: Phase was the game's quiet MVP — 18 assists, only 1 death, and you enabled both aces (14.4, 26.8). Your reads were spotless. This is the support performance that lets a fed carry close; nothing to change.
perPlayer.16f28434-561f-4f23-9454-40321f4a1ef3: Serath went 4/0 — zero deaths and 22k damage as the offlane, even though the lane was read as theirs all game. You were in the 14.4 Fangtooth ace. Flawless positioning; you turned an unfavored matchup into a non-issue by simply never dying into it.
perPlayer.a0c393cc-1437-4bdc-8168-64676ce2166c: Carry of the game — Sparrow 12/4/7, 18k into objectives, and present for both aces. Your Vanquisher at 25 and Imperator at 36 kept you online. The lane was read as theirs early but you flipped it; keep farming safe and letting the team open fights for you.
perPlayer.10edbf65-457d-48d0-9151-9df5b4fcb40a: Gadget went 5/5/11 and you were in the 14.4 ace. The deaths came from the open-map bad trades (12.9, 23.7) — as a ranged setup mid, those are the fights to skip. Your value is poke and zone from the back; don't get pulled into coin-toss trades with no objective up.
perPlayer.a412baf3-dd17-4f89-8ecf-9d0704f3a79e: Khaimera was the favored jungle and you were everywhere the objectives were — present for both aces and the 30.8 close (5-2). 7 deaths is the watch-out, some from the 12.9 and 23.7 bad trades. You set the pace; reset after a bad invade rather than re-flipping it, and this is a clean game.

Willy Guggenheim (midlane) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 1-3 into a numbers advantage.

threats: Chain-CC risk (1 hard-CC abilities, ~0.5s of lockdown): Iggy & Scorch Inferno (knockback). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
synergy: Your engage/CC: Gadget Security Gate (root 1s). Your kills come from landing burst INSIDE that CC window — whoever lands it, the rest must follow up immediately.
You have sustain (Phase) — favor the longer fight where your heals out-grind them.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Telekinetic Link an ally → Psychic Flare blind → Energy Lance → Hyperflux buff ult
ourKits.winCondition: buff a hyper-carry through the Link and Hyperflux for a teamfight
ourKits.passive: abilities heal her and her linked ally
ourKits.playWith: the strongest carry to Link and supercharge
ourKits.playAgainst: kill the linked carry, not Phase; break the link timing

ourKits.combo: Ascend dive → Heaven's Fury multi-strike → Chastise slow → Heresy form ult, resets on takedowns
ourKits.winCondition: dive the backline and snowball Heresy resets
ourKits.playWith: a frontline that creates her dive angle
ourKits.playAgainst: peel the backline — deny the first kill and her resets dry up

ourKits.combo: Piercing Shot poke → Heightened Senses AS → Hail of Arrows zone → Inner Fire ult
ourKits.winCondition: ramp Relentless + AS and sustained-DPS the front down
ourKits.playWith: heavy peel — she's immobile and pure DPS
ourKits.playAgainst: she has zero escape — hard-engage her and she dies first

ourKits.combo: Security Gate root → Sticky Mine → Tesla Dome zone ult
ourKits.winCondition: root with the gate and trap a fight inside the Tesla Dome
ourKits.passive: FDA stacks grant scaling magical power
ourKits.playWith: frontline that holds enemies in her Dome
ourKits.playAgainst: dodge the gate; spread vs the Dome — she's immobile, dive her

ourKits.combo: Ambush leap → Unleash AS → Cull stun, Invigorate to cleanse+heal
ourKits.winCondition: stick on one target, stun with Cull and out-sustain via Spirit Regen
ourKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his Cull stun
ourKits.playAgainst: ANTI-HEAL is mandatory — it guts his whole kit; kite the leap and CC through Invigorate

enemyKits.combo: Oil Spill → Molotov ignite → Flame Turret → Inferno knockback ult
enemyKits.winCondition: layer fire zones on a choke/objective and burn the team
enemyKits.playWith: CC that holds enemies in his fire
enemyKits.playAgainst: don't fight in his zones — flank; kill the turret, dive him

enemyKits.combo: Detection Protocol track → Chrono Swipe → Primeval Roar shield → Ursine Burst grab ult
enemyKits.winCondition: grab a key target out of position and burst them down
enemyKits.playWith: a team that collapses on his grabbed target
enemyKits.playAgainst: his grab ult is the whole threat — bait it / stay spaced; CC during Primeval Roar

enemyKits.combo: Boreal Sweep slow → Hoarfrost root → Glacial Charge engage → Cryoseism stun ult
enemyKits.winCondition: chain frost CC (slow→root→stun) to lock the fight down
enemyKits.playWith: burst that converts her long CC chain into kills
enemyKits.playAgainst: she's a CC battery — cleanse/QSS the Cryoseism stun; spread to avoid the chain

enemyKits.combo: Stasis Bomb stun → Photon Disruptor slow → Containment Fence wall → Ion Strike slow ult
enemyKits.winCondition: lock a target with stun + fence and let the team collapse
enemyKits.passive: Rocket Boots mobility, refreshed by abilities
enemyKits.playWith: burst that converts her stun/fence into a kill
enemyKits.playAgainst: dodge Stasis Bomb; the fence zones — flank around it

enemyKits.combo: Plasma Grenade → Hypercharge on-hit → Air Assault reposition → Atomiser ult
enemyKits.winCondition: Hypercharge and kite-shoot from Air Assault safety
enemyKits.passive: extra jump; kills cause corpse explosions
enemyKits.playWith: a frontline so she can free-fire airborne
enemyKits.playAgainst: CC her out of Air Assault; she's squishy on the ground

itemTimelineNote: estMin = first minute the role's measured median gold curve covers the cumulative inventory cost (slot order ≈ purchase order) — THEORY, no purchase timestamps in either API

fights.note: caught-out = deaths outside every clustered fight; costs/conversion use a 90s window over timeline majors (older film — no tower times; Fang/Prime/Orb only); itemGap counts participants' items est. online (median-gold model, THEORY)
